verification.execution_method: Browser-run Typeform submission via Playwright against the live free listing form.
success_ui_text: We'll be in touch over the next few days to proceed with your listing.
verification.confirmation_state: thank-you screen rendered after final Submit click

why_this_action: The current audit still says distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion is the live bottleneck and Codeberg adoption is flat.
Apollo is already in a measurement window, Reddit remains structurally degraded, and many same-family curator lanes are already saturated.
AI Tools exposed a fresh free-listing path through an unauthenticated Typeform, which let this run ship a real Codeberg-first submission instead of another draft or recommendation.
expected_outcome: Qualified AI-tool directory traffic reaches the primary Codeberg repo through a fresh third-party listing that is easy for evaluators to inspect.
replacement_condition: If there is no live AI Tools listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-13, treat this lane as pending-only and spend the next fresh-action slot on another untouched executable distribution surface.
